cases.request: Fix a typo in README and run the normal release gate.
cases.rationale: Small edits should not pay for unnecessary workflow fan-out.

cases.request: Add a new run status field to the API response and persistence model.
cases.rationale: Runtime and API behavior must be spec-first and verified through concrete release evidence.

cases.request: Rename the User domain model to Account across routes, tasks, tests, docs, and event payloads.
cases.rationale: A broad rename needs slice isolation, durable task state, synthesis, and adversarial review.

cases.request: Verify every factual claim in a release note against code, tests, and logs before publishing.
cases.rationale: Claim checking must split extraction, evidence lookup, source criticism, and synthesis.

cases.request: Research why provider latency increased by combining code paths, logs, metrics, and vendor notes.
cases.rationale: Research should fan out by source family and return only cited synthesis.

cases.request: Review a proposed auth middleware change and validate whether it can be bypassed.
cases.rationale: Security work needs discovery, validation, and remediation review in separate contexts.

cases.request: Mine the last six months of incidents, dedupe them, and identify recurring root causes with owners.
cases.rationale: Incident triage reads untrusted evidence, dedupes at scale, and escalates without privileged writes.

cases.request: Generate many names for a CLI tool and choose the top three through rubric-based comparison.
cases.rationale: Taste-based selection is better handled by alternatives, rubric, and tournament judgment.

cases.request: Coordinate a platform upgrade across several sessions where subtasks have blockers and dependencies.
cases.rationale: Long-running work needs durable task metadata, dependencies, blockers, and resumable evidence.

cases.request: Make local startup, smoke testing, logs, and metrics easier for agents to inspect before release.
cases.rationale: Runtime observability and smoke paths need deterministic feedback surfaces, not only prose runbooks.

cases.request: An agent keeps missing the same streaming guardrail failure; turn that failure into a durable regression gate.
cases.rationale: Repeated process failures should become tests, evals, scripts, hooks, or reviewer checks with verifier reruns.

cases.request: Build a one-off HTML editor for feature flags that warns about dependency conflicts and exports a JSON diff.
cases.rationale: Interactive artifacts are the right fit when a human must tune structured data and export changes.

cases.request: Mine repeated review corrections and turn the survivors into a reusable repo skill with gotchas and scripts.
cases.rationale: Skill evolution should ground rules in real corrections and test that they change future behavior.
